arts.ttl: Man City XI vs Ipswich – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City make the trip to Ipswich Town this weekend for the first Premier League meeting between the teams at Portman Road since 2001. Pep Guardiola’s side saw their three-game winning run ended in midweek, after blowing a two-goal lead to draw at Brentford. arts.ttl: Ipswich vs Manchester City – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City travel to Portman Road for the first time since 2002 this Sunday to face Ipswich Town. The reigning champions have an advantage over Ipswich as they have had two more days rest following their draw with Brentford. Young Brazilian defender Vitor Reis is close to completing a £35 million switch to the Etihad Stadium.
